name: Seoul K-Culture Highlights
description: A 7-day cultural tour of Seoul, combining palace visits, street food, K-pop landmarks, and a day trip to the DMZ.
highlights: Gyeongbokgung Palace, Myeongdong shopping, Korean BBQ dinner, K-pop studio visit, DMZ guided tour.

itineraries.activity: Arrival in Seoul and welcome dinner
Gyeongbokgung Palace and Bukchon Hanok Village
Myeongdong street food and shopping experience
K-pop culture studio visit and Han River cruise
DMZ tour and return to Seoul
Free day with optional N Seoul Tower visit
Departure

inclusions: Airport transfers, 3-star hotel accommodation, daily breakfast, local guide, DMZ tour, city transportation pass.
exclusions: International airfare, travel insurance, personal expenses, Korea visa fees, optional activities.
notes: Bring a valid passport with at least 6 months validity
Korea visa requirements may change; check before booking

name: Europe Grand Capitals
description: A 10-day grand tour through Paris, Amsterdam, and Berlin with guided city sightseeing, Seine cruise, and local culinary experiences.
highlights: Eiffel Tower visit, Louvre museum walk, canal cruise in Amsterdam, Berlin Wall history tour, European breakfast buffet.

itineraries.activity: Arrival in Paris and orientation walk
Paris city tour and Seine river cruise
Louvre visit and Montmartre exploration
Train to Amsterdam and canal cruise
Amsterdam city cycling tour
Travel to Berlin and evening walk
Berlin Wall memorial and museum island
Free day for optional local markets
Farewell dinner and review session
Departure

inclusions: Hotel accommodation, daily breakfast, intercity train tickets, airport transfers, guided tours, museum entrance fees.
exclusions: International airfare, Schengen visa fees, travel insurance, personal expenses, optional tours.
notes: Schengen visa is required and should be applied for early
Pack a universal power adapter for European outlets
Weather can vary between cities; pack layers

name: Palawan Island Escape
description: A 6-day immersive tour of Palawan's top natural attractions, including island hopping, hidden lagoons, and cultural village visits.
highlights: Honda Bay island hopping, Puerto Princesa Underground River, El Nido sunset cruise, local seafood feast.

itineraries.activity: Arrival in Puerto Princesa and welcome dinner
Puerto Princesa Underground River tour and city orientation
Transfer to El Nido and sunset beach walk
El Nido island hopping tour A
Free morning and optional kayak rental
Departure after breakfast

inclusions: Daily breakfast, airport transfers, accommodation, land transfers, guided tours, Puerto Princesa Underground River permit fees, El Nido island-hopping boat fees.
exclusions: Round-trip airfare to Puerto Princesa, travel insurance, personal expenses, optional activities, government terminal fees.
notes: Permit fees are included, but extra fees may apply for drones or oversized luggage
Finish your snorkeling gear rental one day before the tour

name: Boracay Beach & Culture Retreat
description: A 5-day Boracay experience with beach activities, local cuisine, and a cultural village visit designed for families and friends.
highlights: White Beach sunset cruise, island hopping, traditional Filipino cooking demonstration, local market visit.

itineraries.activity: Arrival in Boracay and beachfront welcome reception
Island hopping and snorkeling at Puka Shell Beach
Cultural cooking class and local market tour
Free day with optional parasailing or spa
Farewell breakfast and departure

inclusions: Hotel accommodation, daily breakfast, airport transfers, island hopping tour, cooking class, local guide.
exclusions: Airfare to Caticlan, terminal fees, personal expenses, optional adventure sports.
notes: Local market prices may vary seasonally
Book optional activities at least one day in advance
